App Settings
Studio profile, team, and app preferences
Appears in the header of invoice PDFs and other exports. Changes save instantly.
Tokens: {client.lastName} {client.firstName} {project.name} {project.code} {vendor.name} {space.name} {po.number}
Members of your studio. Owner can invite, edit permissions,
and remove members.
These units appear as options when setting quantities on proposal items and components.
Two kinds of statuses live here. Item Pipeline statuses track proposal items through the order lifecycle — automations (invoice-sent, invoice-paid, cancel) depend on the internal codes, so built-in ones can't be deleted, but you can rename their display labels and change their colors. Project Task statuses are free-form labels for your project to-do lists.
Item Pipeline Statuses
Project Task Statuses
Cards available for expense tracking.
Reusable email templates with variables that auto-fill from the invoice / project / client. Built-in templates show with a lock icon. Click one to edit or delete your custom ones.
Available variables: {client.name} {client.firstName} {client.email} {client.phone} {project.name} {project.address} {invoice.number} {invoice.total} {invoice.dueDate} {invoice.sentDate} {invoice.phase} {studio.name} {studio.email} {studio.phone} {me.name}
Control which payment methods are offered per invoice type, and add custom methods (informational text or external link) for special cases.
Choose a theme and toggle which sections appear on every invoice / receipt email you send. Changes preview live and apply to the next email sent.
Default note presets that can be attached to any invoice. Toggle "Default on" to have a preset pre-selected on new invoices. Per-invoice free-form notes still work alongside these.
Studio-configurable lists powering the pickers elsewhere in the app. Rename in place — changes cascade to every record using the old name.
Vendor Types
Used in the Contacts "Filter by type" row and the Type field on each vendor (e.g. Manufacturer, Workroom, Receiver, Architect, GC, Upholsterer).
Brand Offering Categories
The product categories a brand sells — picked on the Brand editor (e.g. Textile, Lighting, Furniture, Tile, Wallcovering).
Item Types
Optional taxonomy for proposal items — picked when creating or editing an item (e.g. Furniture, Lighting, Plumbing, Hardware, Window Treatment). Pick a color so type pills are easy to scan.
Tax States
States where you collect sales tax. Each entry: state name, tax rate, your resale # in that state, and how often you file. Project Settings → State picks from this list and auto-fills the tax rate.
Freight & associated charges
Categories of freight-related charges that appear on items and components. Default markup blank = use the project's markup; explicit 0 = bill at cost. Taxable means it's subject to sales tax when the project's freight tax flag is on.
Theme picker. Click a swatch to apply instantly. Saved per-device — cross-device sync coming later.
Default reminder schedule per invoice type. Individual invoices can override this in their builder. Each rule picks an email template used when the reminder fires.
New Project
Project Address
Project Settings
Auto-filled from App Settings → Categories → Tax States when you pick a state.

Billing & Tax
Tax settings flow from App Settings → Categories → Tax States. Changing the state here pulls in its defaults.

Other associated charges

Estimation Lines
These are added on top of the current proposal totals.

Freight % is a proposal-time estimate, used for client quoting and snapshots. Actual freight bills via per-item Freight Cost Status during invoicing.

Estimate Total $0.00

New Expense
Batch Update Statuses
Pick a target status, then check the items you want to flip. Defaults to all selected.
Log Freight Actual
—
Creates a linked nonbillable expense in this project so the cost shows in P&L. Use when you want freight costs to count toward project profitability.
Freight Reconciliation
Print Item PM Page
Choose which sections to include. The item name, status, and export timestamp are always shown.
New Task
Subtasks
Attachments
Activity (click to expand)
Comments
Cancel Paid Invoice
Choose how to cancel
Project Credits
Credits accumulated on this project from overpayments, freight/cost overcollection, or cancelled invoices held as credit. Will be applicable to future invoices on this project.
Bill Freight as Retainer
Apply a single freight retainer % across selected items. The % you enter is what the client sees (no markup is added on top). Unchecked items keep their existing freight — $ allowances on the proposal still pull through automatically.
Items on this invoice
Invite Team Member
Creates an account for the person and queues a password reset email so they can set their own password.
Permissions
Email Template
Available variables — click to insert at cursor:
Reminder
This reminder auto-sends on the invoice's due date. It is always on and can't be removed — you can only change the email template below.
Tax State
0.00%
Stack components like "TX State 6.25%" + "Travis County 1%" + "Austin 1%". Each saves separately for your accountant; the client sees the combined total.
Defaults for projects on this state
When a project is set to this state, these defaults apply automatically. Editing them here cascades to existing projects tagged to this state (you'll be asked).
Note Preset
Send Invoice
Sends a branded email to the client with a link to the payment page. Method buttons (ACH, Card, Wire, Check) all appear on that page.
Separate multiple addresses with commas.
Record Payment
Custom Payment Method
Unchecked types won't see this method on their payment page.
Export New List
List type:
Filters — combine any. Empty filter = no restriction.
Columns to include
Price columns — pick any combination, or none
Rooms / Spaces list
Exports all rooms in the project, with each room's internal note. Useful for a quick at-a-glance space inventory or a paint / direction handoff.
